summary: Comprehensive testing of 444.HEIMAT-FUNK Music new features: Security (50MB upload limit, CORS), Pagination, Play logging, Weekly stats dashboard. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features working correctly including WeeklyStatsCard with animated counters and progress rings.
critical_code_review_comments: Upload limit check happens AFTER reading file into memory - for very large files this could cause memory issues before the 413 is returned. Consider using Content-Length header check first.
CORS is properly restricted to preview URL in backend/.env
Pagination implemented correctly with page/limit params and max limit of 200
play_log collection properly indexed on startup for efficient weekly stats queries
WeeklyStatsCard uses framer-motion for smooth animations
AnimatedCounter component provides nice UX with counting animation
ProgressRing SVG circles animate smoothly for top songs visualization
seed_data_creation: Used existing song 'KRIEG - DEUTSCHE VITA (2)' with 8+ play_log entries for weekly stats testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working. Weekly stats shows 8 plays, 23 minutes, 1 song, 1 new discovery. Brute force lockout works after 5 failed attempts. Pagination works with page/limit params. Small file uploads succeed. CORS headers present.

frontend_navigation.Bibliothek page: PASS - Shows song with Disc icon placeholder
frontend_navigation.Verlauf page: PASS - Shows play history with 9x count

verified_features: Pagination with page/limit params on GET /api/songs
POST /api/history logs to both history and play_log collections
WeeklyStatsCard shows progress ring circles for top songs
All UI in German (Wiedergaben, Minuten, Songs, etc)
